turns.content:
You are gsd-plan-checker. Run goal-backward analysis on P51 PLAN.

## Objective
Verify 51-PLAN.md achieves 7 EARS requirements. Produce 51-PLAN-CHECK.md with PASS/FAIL verdict.

## Execution Context
- Phase: 51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree
- Plan: .planning/phases/51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree/51-PLAN.md (327 lines, 8 tasks across 6 waves)
- Spec: .planning/phases/51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree/51-SPEC.md (251 lines, 7 EARS)
- Branch: feature/harness-implementation

## 7 EARS Gate Table
| REQ | Type | Summary | Plan Task |
|-----|------|---------|-----------|
| REQ-51-01 | Ubiquitous | 3 classes (tmux-multiplexer, session-manager, grid-planner) with ≥10 ORIGIN annotations each | T2,T3,T4 |
| REQ-51-02 | State-driven | integration.ts as factory, drop fork-bridge import | T5 |
| REQ-51-03 | Unwanted | Remove fork-bridge.ts + dead test, 0 refs remain | T6 |
| REQ-51-04 | Optional | 6 BATS (2/cluster) | T7 |
| REQ-51-05 | Optional | 15+ vitest (5+/class) | T7 |
| REQ-51-06 | State-driven | Preserve D-04 observable contract | T5,T6 |
| REQ-51-07 | Ubiquitous | Atomic commit + L1 evidence | T8 |

## Verification Commands (run these)
1. `wc -l .planning/phases/51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree/51-PLAN.md`
2. `grep -c 'REQ-51-' .planning/phases/51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree/51-PLAN.md`
3. Test: SPEC .planning/phases/51-synthesize-core-tmux-classes-in-tree/51-SPEC.md exists
4. `grep -c 'fork-bridge\|opencode-tmux' src/features/tmux/fork-bridge.ts`
5. Compute: is plan safe to execute? (all EARS mapped? tasks ordered by dependency? no task >200 LOC? risk mitigations in place?)

## Goal-Backward Analysis
Read 51-PLAN.md and 51-SPEC.md. For each REQ-51-XX, trace backward: does the plan's task sequence guarantee this requirement? If any REQ has no covering task, flag as GAP.

## DAG & Sanity Checklist
- Dependency ordering: Wave 1 (types) → Wave 2 (3 classes, parallel) → Wave 3 (integration rewrite) → Wave 4 (fork removal) → Wave 5 (tests) → Wave 6 (commit+verify) = VALID
- File conflicts: no task writes same file as another in same wave
- Risk mitigations: check plan has rollback/safety steps

## Template Structure
Produce 51-PLAN-CHECK.md with:
- Verdict: PASS/FAIL/PASS-WITH-FLAGS (one line)
- EARS Coverage Table (7 rows, task:line refs)
- Goal-Backward Analysis (7 REQs, traceback paragraphs)
- DAG & Sanity Check results
- Risk Register (mitigations present?)
- Flags (specific concerns)
- Recommendation: proceed to EXECUTE or revise

## CRITICAL RULES
- USE TOOLS to read files and run commands — do NOT rely on conversation memory
- Return ONLY the completed 51-PLAN-CHECK.md content as your final message
- If aborted or incomplete, ensure partial output is still committed
